message:
feat(rchd): remote process group cleanup via PGID file, cancellation and history refinements

CancellationRecord now carries remote_pgid_file for targeted
process-group cleanup via build_remote_kill_script() instead of
solely relying on pkill environment-variable matching.

Also: types.rs additions, hook/transfer/api/history refinements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
